---
id: app-setup-bitrise-yml-config-update
title: "Changing the location of the application's bitrise.yaml"
description: "Changing the location of the application's bitrise.yaml. Requires administrator level privileges to the app."

hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Changing the location of the application's bitrise.yaml"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/bitrise.yml/config"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Changing the location of the application's bitrise.yaml. Requires administrator level privileges to the app.
